use_cases: Custom cursor styling with smooth animated tracking for portfolio and creative websites
Visual hover feedback on interactive elements using state detection
Enhancing user experience with dual-layer cursor animation effect
Adding subtle motion to static pages without disrupting functionality
Creative UI enhancement for media and e-commerce storefronts
ai_summary: A custom cursor follower component that smoothly tracks mouse position using linear interpolation. Features dual-dot animation with an inner dot following quickly and an outer border trailing slowly. Includes hover state detection on interactive elements to trigger visual transitions. Provides elegant motion feedback without being intrusive, suitable for creative portfolios and modern web experiences.
